title: OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM - 211info
text: EUGENE SERVICE STATION OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal camping, free garbage disposal, and portable restrooms for those living in their vehicles (tents are not allowed). Participants are hosted by faith communities, businesses, nonprofit organizations, or government offices. 450 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless and living in their vehicle (RV, trailer, motorhome, truck, car, van, or tiny house) Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 689-6747 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 689-6747 Main phone Main phone (541) 689-6747 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website and fill out a Parking Enrollment Form or call for space availability FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near LTD bus lines 40 and 41. Services: Homeless Safe Parking Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - DAWN TO DAWN HOUSING/SHELTER - EUGENE SERVICE STATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE SERVICE STATION
